# name: # Canonical dependency manifest for FLOW. TAB-separated. See PREREQUISITES/.
# FLOW degrades gracefully — the flow-mcp launcher resolves the pinned binary lazily; a missing

install-hint: coreutils (sha256sum) or perl shasum — verify the pinned flow-mcp asset
rustup.rs — dev/source-build fallback for flow-mcp when no pinned release fits this platform
cli.github.com (inspect release assets / cut a flow-mcp pin)
